name: NordVPN
tagline: Best overall VPN for privacy and streaming
description: NordVPN combines blazing-fast speeds with military-grade encryption and a strict no-logs policy, making it our top pick for 2026.
longDescription: NordVPN has established itself as the industry leader through continuous innovation and a commitment to user privacy. With over 6,300 servers across 111 countries, it offers the largest server network among premium VPNs. The proprietary NordLynx protocol (built on WireGuard) delivers exceptional speeds while maintaining top-tier security. NordVPN's Threat Protection feature blocks malware, ads, and trackers even when you're not connected to the VPN — a unique feature that sets it apart from competitors. Four independent security audits (most recently by Deloitte in 2025) confirm their no-logs policy, and their Panama jurisdiction ensures no mandatory data retention laws can compromise your privacy.
pros: 6,300+ servers in 111 countries — largest network available
Threat Protection blocks malware, ads, and trackers
Works reliably with Netflix, Hulu, BBC iPlayer, Disney+
Independently audited no-logs policy (4 audits completed)
cons: Higher renewal price after first subscription term
Linux app lacks some features found in Windows/Mac versions

keyFeatures.name: Threat Protection
keyFeatures.description: Built-in malware blocker, ad blocker, and tracker protection that works even when the VPN is disconnected. Automatically scans downloads for threats.

keyFeatures.name: NordLynx Protocol
keyFeatures.description: Proprietary VPN protocol based on WireGuard that delivers exceptional speed without compromising security. Up to 2x faster than OpenVPN in our tests.

keyFeatures.name: Meshnet
keyFeatures.description: Create encrypted private tunnels between up to 60 devices for secure file sharing, remote access, and virtual LAN parties regardless of physical location.

keyFeatures.name: Dedicated IP
keyFeatures.description: Get a personal static IP address that only you use. Ideal for accessing IP-restricted networks, online banking, and avoiding CAPTCHA prompts.

verdict: NordVPN is the best VPN for most people in 2026. Its combination of speed, security features, and streaming capabilities is unmatched at this price point. While the renewal price is higher than some competitors, the feature set and proven reliability justify the cost. We recommend the 2-year plan for the best value.

faqs.question: Does NordVPN work with Netflix?
faqs.answer: Yes. NordVPN reliably unblocks Netflix US, UK, Canada, Japan, and over 15 other regional libraries. If you encounter issues, their 24/7 live chat support can direct you to the optimal server for streaming. In our testing, we successfully accessed Netflix on 18 out of 20 server attempts.

faqs.question: Is NordVPN safe to use?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. NordVPN uses AES-256-GCM encryption (the same standard used by governments and militaries), has undergone four independent security audits (most recently by Deloitte in 2025), and operates under Panama's privacy-friendly jurisdiction with no mandatory data retention laws. It also features a kill switch, DNS leak protection, and RAM-only servers.

faqs.question: How many devices can I connect simultaneously?
faqs.answer: NordVPN allows up to 10 simultaneous device connections on a single account. This covers most households — you can protect your phone, laptop, tablet, smart TV, and still have slots left for family members. The apps are available on Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android, Android TV, and as browser extensions.

faqs.question: What is the best NordVPN plan for new users?
faqs.answer: The 2-year plan offers the best value at $3.99/month (billed $95.76 upfront). This includes a 30-day money-back guarantee, so you can test the service risk-free. We recommend avoiding the monthly plan ($12.99/month) as it's significantly more expensive.

author.name: Alex Chen

author.bio: Alex has tested over 50 VPN services across 5 years at TrueTopReviews. He holds CISSP and CEH certifications and specializes in network security and privacy technologies.
